name: joai-cursor
description: Connect Cursor to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Cursor to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
interface.longDescription: Create and manage AI-powered coding agents that work autonomously on your repositories. Automate code changes, workflows, and pull requests with Cursor's Cloud Agents API.
defaultPrompt: List the Cursor tools available in this app.
Explain what setup or authentication Cursor needs before I run an action.
Use Cursor to help me with the task I describe next.
